This summer, Paris will become the world's second city after London to host the Summer Olympic Games three times. Paris has consistently surprised the world, with each Olympic Games pioneering in its own way. Let's take a trip down memory lane as we anticipate what Paris will bring us this time!

title: The firsts of all three Paris Olympic Games - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: This summer, Paris will become the world's second city after London to host the Summer Olympic Games three times. Paris has consistently surprised the world, with each Olympic Games pioneering in its own way. Let's take a trip down memory lane as we anticipate what Paris will bring us this time!
